# local-llm-mcp

> Optional fleet LLM hub: MCP portmanteau tools for Ollama, LM Studio, and cloud APIs, plus dashboard on 10832/10833. Not the default sampling backend — most fleet MCPs use Ollama at `127.0.0.1:11434/v1` directly.

**Full detail: see [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt)**

---

## Quick links

- [README.md](README.md) — quick start and honest status
- [INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md) — setup and troubleshooting
- [docs/PURPOSE.md](docs/PURPOSE.md) — hub vs per-repo Ollama
- [docs/PRD.md](docs/PRD.md) — product requirements (some features partial)
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) — release notes
- [.env.example](.env.example) — provider URLs and API keys (copy to `.env`)

---

## Ports

| Service | Default |
|---------|---------|
| Dashboard frontend | `10832` |
| Dashboard API | `10833` |
| Ollama (external) | `11434` |
| LM Studio (external) | `1234` |

---

## Run (summary)

```powershell
uv sync
copy .env.example .env
uv run llm-mcp
```

Dashboard: `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File web_sota\start.ps1`

---

## Tools (summary)

Portmanteau pattern — pass `operation=...` on each tool.

| Tool | Role |
|------|------|
| `llm_health` | Health, metrics, tool discovery |
| `llm_models` | Model list, registration, provider inventory |
| `llm_generation` | Text, chat, embeddings |
| `llm_multimodal` | Vision / image ops (provider-dependent) |
| `llm_finetuning` | LoRA / adapter ops (heavy deps) |
| `llm_ollama` | Ollama-specific operations |
| `llm_lmstudio` | LM Studio-specific operations |
| `llm_vllm` | vLLM (optional, often disabled) |
| `llm_gpu` | GPU telemetry |
| `health_check` | Server heartbeat |

Legacy tools: `LLM_MCP_ENABLE_LEGACY_TOOLS=true`.

---

## Providers

| Provider | Typical use |
|----------|-------------|
| Ollama | Local models (`OLLAMA_BASE_URL`) |
| LM Studio | Local GUI backend (`LMSTUDIO_BASE_URL`) |
| OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini / Perplexity | Cloud (API keys in `.env`) |
| vLLM / HuggingFace | Experimental; optional install |

---

## Fleet note

Registered in mcp-central-docs as **local-llm-mcp** (`10832`/`10833`). Keep for centralized LLM ops; do not assume other MCPs route through this server unless you change their `*_SAMPLING_BASE_URL`.
